steps.gwtzphpx: Wait for @knight-kirk to invade and then kill him to get the @spiked-shield and @barbed-straight-sword
steps.hj799c7p: Roll down to the first platform, kill the @burrowing-rockworm guarding the bonfire and rest there
steps.mic8tkuj: Go down the stairs and go left along the ledge to get the @large-flame-ember from the chest, remembering about the @burrowing-rockworm traps

jjxfwf5u.content: Go back to the fog gate and if you are level two in the @chaos-servant covenant then go down to the right and open the shortcut to @lost-izalith

steps.0ge1b66l: If you want to save @solaire-of-astora[Solaire] then kill all the bugs to get the @sunlight-maggot and use this shortcut to talk to him

bj8jcxwl.content: Go through the fog gate and kill the @demon-firesage

steps.o74wsnm6: Don't forget the @soul-of-a-brave-warrior up the stairs behind the @stone-demon[Stone Demons]

steps.nw00o13g: Optionally do some @guide-to-co-operative-play[jolly co-op] to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 55-60+ to get summoned
steps.mrk56k3x: Go upstairs to open the shortcut back to @quelaags-domain
steps.gindck26: Go back the way you came and go down and rest at the bonfire

steps.61dmgwr9: Cut off his tail and then kill the tail to get @orange-charred-ring, though he will drop the ring anyway when killed
steps.cc63mjrw: Don't forget the @green-titanite-shard in the open area around to the right

steps.334xyq9z: Optionally do some @guide-to-co-operative-play[jolly co-op] to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 60+ to get summoned
steps.9k33oak6: Leave boss area by the tunnel, rest at the bonfire and talk to @solaire-of-astora[Solaire] if he's there

steps.1m75txyt: Make your way to the first building, picking up the two souls along the way, and open the chest inside to get another soul
steps.349tp48y: Run up the branch of the next building and get the @twin-humanities
steps.ytc2xgmp: Drop down to the base of the building and hit the illusory wall of the building, rest at the bonfire and make sure you are human
steps.bgdut5bc: Continue on in to the ruins and grab the soul hidden to the left just before you go up the stairs
steps.ao5lsefl: Go up the stairs, kill the @chaos-eater, kill the Daughter of Chaos to get the @izalith-catalyst, and wait for @knight-kirk to invade and then kill him
steps.vjata0q6: Kill the second @chaos-eater and open the chest to get the @chaos-fire-whip pyromancy
steps.2lzryb1v: Go down the branch and kill all the @stone-demon[Stone Demons]
steps.9s3ntea8: Kill the @titanite-demon to get a @demon-titanite and if you didn't open the shortcut earlier then open it now and kill the bugs to get the @sunlight-maggot
steps.36tb9wfu: Trigger the collapsing floor by walking to the left of the alcove
steps.o0gof3ok: Put on the @rusted-iron-ring, walk down the branch, do not talk to @siegmeyer-of-catarina[Siegmeyer] yet but instead kill all but one of the @chaos-eater[Chaos Eaters] using ranged attacks
steps.zh1hfto8: Now talk to @siegmeyer-of-catarina[Siegmeyer] and follow him when he jumps in to the pit and make sure he doesn't lose more than half his health while killing the remaining @chaos-eater[Chaos Eaters]
steps.wkm9k22q: Grab the soul and @green-titanite-shard[Green Titanite Shards] and then talk to him again
steps.ic0dhp7g: Make your way through the tunnels, getting the @red-titanite-slab from the chest and then the @red-titanite-chunk after going up the stairs
steps.ffd84npg: Make your way back up the branches and back up to the boss fog gate

steps.etxmm32j: You need to destroy the right orb first, then the left orb and then drop down in the center to kill her

steps.7zgdckcj: Optionally do some @guide-to-co-operative-play[jolly co-op] to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 60-75+ to get summoned
steps.kvbaqpej: Warp back to the @daughter-of-chaos bonfire and get the @thorns-set
steps.4g51eqep: Go back down to the @demon-ruins, kill the @taurus-demon[Taurus Demons], and get the @chaos-flame-ember and soul from the lava
steps.6raegmd3: Warp to the Stone Dragon bonfire, walk along the sand to the @ash-lake bonfire and talk to @sieglinde-of-catarina[Sieglinde] to get a @titanite-slab
steps.qob1112d: Make sure you are using a @divine-ember[Divine weapon], warp back to @firelink-shrine and continue down in to @the-catacombs

steps.pe4dkrrr: Go down to the first bonfire, kill the @undead-mage and pull the first switch
steps.v02uzphc: Use a ranged attack to take out the next @undead-mage
steps.yce9oacs: Clear out the room the @undead-mage was in and get the @lucerne from the side room
steps.ccl0onys: Continue clearing out this area, grabbing the soul from near the archer, head outside passed the statue spike traps, push the second switch and get the soul
steps.zrh7o3zo: Cross the bridge and quickly kill the next @undead-mage
steps.assqttda: Go in to the side room to the right, fall through the floor and try to get the two @crystal-lizard[Crystal Lizards] while avoiding the statue spike traps
steps.g9czx2yp: Climb up the ladder and fall through the floor again to get back to the second switch
steps.blbif0di: Go back across the bridge and at the end of it drop down three times to the left, pick up the @great-scythe and push the third switch
steps.ck5hiky5: Head outside, push the fourth switch, roll through the illusory wall and rest at the bonfire
steps.mz85rw8s: Go across the bridge and through the fog gate, hit the broken wall, drop down and clear out the room
steps.8lupl846: Continue up the steps, watch out for the giant skeleton that drops from the roof and get the @darkmoon-seance-ring from the coffin
steps.315c1rij: Go out the broken wall, continue up the steps, kill the @undead-mage and climb up the ladder
steps.pknjx515: Get the @tranquil-walk-of-peace miracle and fall through the floor to near the start of the level
steps.kgm7428p: Continue all the way back across the bridges to the building with all of the coffins
steps.nsk4gx6d: Nestle in the coffin on the left just before the @titanite-demon to go to the @tomb-of-giants[Tomb of the Giants] and optionally join the @gravelord-servant covenant
steps.p8orpwe5: Use the coffin to get back, go down the corridor and through the broken wall, drop down through the floor and kill the @black-knight to get the @white-titanite-chunk
steps.ryqhjz4c: Use ranged attacks to kill all the @wheel-skeleton[Wheel Skeletons] and before dropping down
steps.tzeew6ca: Go through the tunnel near where you dropped down and kill the @undead-mage to get the @skull-lantern
steps.3pyjgod1: Climb up the two ladders and back to entrance of the building with all the coffins, go outside and drop off to the ledge where you can summon @paladin-leeroy
steps.nj3zrkpy: Drop off to the next ledge to get the @cleric-set and @mace

steps.cqqfm0gx: As described above you can summon @paladin-leeroy from the ledge above the area with the @wheel-skeleton[Wheel Skeletons]
steps.xhkqs1rs: You will get the @rite-of-kindling when you kill him
steps.6nx975yc: He will drop one of @mask-of-the-father, @mask-of-the-mother or @mask-of-the-child

steps.jqcfq7yc: Optionally do some @guide-to-co-operative-play[jolly co-op] to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 20-40 or 55-65 to get summoned
steps.jav9dwjv: Go up the ladder and continue on the @tomb-of-giants[Tomb of the Giants]

steps.2k2dwp0g: If you got the @sunlight-maggot then wear it otherwise put the @skull-lantern in your left hand
steps.2nux7g1r: Slide down the coffins, climb down the ladder and rest at the bonfire
steps.wbhcylc9: Go back up the ladder, along the ledge to the right, drop down the hole, kill all the giant skeletons and get the @large-divine-ember
steps.zv06jz98: Climb back out, hit the illusory wall along the ledge, climb down the ladder, kill the bone towers and @reah-of-thorolund[Reah's] bodyguards but do not talk to her
steps.pihwmrw4: Get the @white-titanite-chunk, @skull-lantern, souls and head back up the ladder
steps.z6ncnafc: Talk to @patches-the-hyena, answering No to his question and let him kick you down in to the pit
steps.jdmbpg6q: Talk to @reah-of-thorolund[Reah] to get the @replenishment miracle
steps.h3oaz47c: Go back up and talk to @patches-the-hyena[Patches] again, answering No to his question to get @twin-humanities
steps.oviz9fee: Continue passed him and through the fog gate and kill the @the-black-knight[Black Knight] that comes running at you
steps.omn28awy: Kill the archer, grab the soul, jump down, get ready for an ambush by bone towers and grab the @covetous-silver-serpent-ring
steps.qxxfm7si: Jump across and kill the giant skeleton and then continue up, hugging the left wall to get the @effigy-shield
steps.l0otdve5: Go back down to where you killed the last giant skeleton and hug the left wall around to the next bonfire and reverse hollowing
steps.8kx12qde: Go down the path, grab the @white-titanite-chunk, go down the ladder, wait for @paladin-leeroy to invade and kill him to get @sanctus and @grant
steps.8iwc3dsg: Quickly kill the @crystal-lizard in the tunnel
steps.hzuch10q: Continue through the tunnel and down the ledge, clear out the Pinwheels and grab the soul and @white-titanite-slab

steps.dani0vb3: After the fight pick up the @paladin-set, though you may need to reload your game to get it to appear

steps.tsgekpoi: Rest at the bonfire, warp to @firelink-shrine

steps.iimnbcxh: Drop down the hole, offer the Lord Souls, warp back to the shrine and talk to @anastacia-of-astora to fully kindle the shrine bonfire

o9uru9w9.content: Talk to @patches-the-hyena[Patches], learn his Prostration gesture and buy anything you need from him

steps.f37rud8o: You can also buy other various items and weapons

adch8a3k.content: Take a flight back to @northern-undead-asylum[Undead Asylum] and trade items with @snuggly

steps.gvejdku4: You can also get various other titanites and miscellaneous items

steps.ypp5vmvz: Go to @undead-parish and talk to @reah-of-thorolund[Reah], learn her Prayer gesture and buy any miracles you need
steps.4550q5lo: Go to @blacksmith-andrei[Andre] and give him the @large-divine-ember and upgrade your weapon if needed
steps.5y1i05p0: Go back in to the @the-catacombs, drop off the first bridge on to the second, drop down the ledges, go down the spiral staircase and drop down to @blacksmith-vamos
steps.exwyv70v: Give him the @large-flame-ember and @chaos-flame-ember and upgrade your weapon if needed
steps.9iciii64: Return to a bonfire and warp to @anor-londo
steps.aooip4ne: Put on the @darkmoon-seance-ring, go down the elevator and turn the platform lever anti-clockwise and rest at the bonfire
steps.1yljivu3: Pick up the @ring-of-the-suns-firstborn and optonally join the @blade-of-the-dark-moon covenant

kr77vrno.content: If you don't want to join the covenant then go through the fog gate and kill @dark-sun-gwyndolin

steps.az08z7d7: Get the @sunlight-blade miracle and @brass-set from the chests after killing her
steps.ej1i3cgx: You can now buy the @gwyndolin-moonlight-set from @domhnall-of-zena
steps.17ilqglk: @darkmoon-knightess will now attack you if you return to the first @anor-londo bonfire and will drop a @fire-keeper-soul[Firekeeper Soul]

steps.xiitr8ed: Remember to go back return the platform to the up position before leaving here
steps.lregcely: Optionally go and attack @gwynevere to turn @anor-londo dark and get invaded by members of the @blade-of-the-dark-moon covenant
steps.syslmin3: If you don't have the DLC go down to #new-game-plus

steps.nqyh9gmx: Go down to @darkroot-basin and examine the portal found near where you fought the @golden-crystal-golem

2fa8cehf.content: Rest at the bonfire and continue through the fog gate and kill the @sanctuary-guardian

steps.6mvu4wf3: Cut off the tail to get the @guardian-tail

steps.gio69bcp: Continue up the path to @oolacile-sanctuary, rest at the bonfire and talk to @elizabeth, answering Yes to her question
steps.4pfbk6df: Get the @humanity from the corpse, head down to @royal-woods and clear out the Ents and the Stone Guardians from the first section
steps.frkzt045: Get the @guardian-set[Guardian Gauntlets] from the tower on the right side, the @blue-titanite-slab from the chest in the center and the @guardian-set[Guardian Leggings] from the left side
steps.sysgio1i: Cross the bridge on the left, try not to get squashed by @black-dragon-kalameet[Kalameet], quickly kill the @crystal-lizard and watch out for the Stone Guardian that appears
steps.isb11px4: Jump down and across the gap on the left and kill the Ents and the Stone Guardian
steps.kf0pres5: Get the @guardian-set[Guardian Helm] from the ledge, and the @guardian-set[Guardian Armor] and @goughs-great-arrow[Gough's Great Arrows] from near where the Stone Guardian was
steps.c43v4rwq: Get the @elizabeths-mushroom from the hidden alcove
steps.ntoks6gp: Jump back across the gap and clear out the Ents on the left and get the @gold-coin
steps.x6225ln0: Kill the two Stone Giants near the tower and quickly kill the @crystal-lizard
steps.3ppnapno: Get the soul from behind the tower, go down on the elevator and then at the bottom grab the soul from around the corner
steps.gwdnvgo0: Go across the bridge and talk to @marvelous-chester, answering Yes to his question, and buy anything you need from him and use the elevator to open up the shortcut
steps.6uoianmo: Go through the fog gate and kill @artorias-the-abysswalker
steps.9k1vl0a1: Reload your game and kill @lords-blade-ciaran who should now have appeared to get the @lords-blade-set, the @dark-silver-tracer and the @gold-tracer
steps.rd1ociq7: Leave by the other door and in to @oolacile-township and rest at the bonfire
steps.fad5234r: Go back in to @royal-woods and head down the path beside the elevator in to the valley and at the botton get the soul on the left
steps.rc5l6fzp: Continue along the valley, down the ladder, quickly kill the @crystal-lizard, piss off @black-dragon-kalameet enough that he attacks you once and return to the bonfire

steps.daozy2cp: Make sure you have either a @skull-lantern, @sunlight-maggot or the @cast-light sorcery
steps.wm6roaxx: Continue down the steps and stick to the right, grabbing the souls along the way, go around the back of the building and roll down to the next ledge
steps.eqcajqvg: Use your light source on the illusory wall on the building to the left and get the @silver-pendant from the chest
steps.pjdi4z4l: Kill everything in the other building and get the @dark-orb sorcery from the chest and the @carvings[I'm Sorry carving] from the Bloathead Mage on the outside ledge
steps.olkb40jm: Go back to the main path, cross the wooden bridge, get invaded by @marvelous-chester
steps.7xiq6ndr: Continue crossing the wooden bridge, and get the @carvings[Very Good! carving] from the mimic and take out the Bloathead Mage down below with ranged attacks
steps.oigqdygx: Go halfway down the stairs, walk across to the rooftop, and kill the @crystal-lizard. You may have to reload the game to make the Crystal Lizard appear
steps.phkoz4v7: Continue down and across the walkway, very carefully clear out the ground floor of the building and get the @rubbish, @dark-fog sorcery and soul
steps.rucczw2n: Go upstairs, use your light source on the illusory wall and get the @red-titanite-chunk from the chest
steps.hzdvhfjc: Head back across the rafters, roll down to the balcony and get the @crest-key from the mimic
steps.gv4wsni0: Drop on to the roof from the next room and go up and across the roof to get a @twin-humanities
steps.fxwwq4xd: Drop off the roof, go across to open up the elevator shortcut and rest at the bonfire
steps.cl9lka22: Go back towards the colosseum, go up the stairs to the right and unlock the door using the @crest-key
steps.p2jnuupk: Talk to @hawkeye-gough twice, answering Yes to both his questions, so that he grounds @black-dragon-kalameet[Kalameet], and buy the @carvings[Hello and Thank You carvings]

3bgze4fv.content: Go back in to @royal-woods and down to the valley and kill @black-dragon-kalameet[Kalameet]

steps.8iid98od: Cut off his tail to get the @obsidian-greatsword
steps.mm7b9f7m: When you kill him he will drop the @calamity-ring
steps.bas6f71g: When he's dead pick up the souls, the @titanite-slab from the chest underneath the waterfall and the @goughs-great-arrow[Gough's Great Arrows] from the end of the valley

steps.hmyiwude: Return to the colosseum and go back up to talk to @hawkeye-gough to get @goughs-greatbow
steps.6597c03j: Go back down the elevator shortcut, carefully clear out the Bloatheads and then kill the Chained Prisoner to get the Helm and Leggings from the @chain-set
steps.57lubtea: Call the elevator, kill the Bloathead that arrives with it and rest at the bonfire

steps.qbk72z9r: Make sure you have your light source equipped, go down the path, quickly kill the @crystal-lizard, kill all the Bloatheads and get the @dark-bead sorcery
steps.hm3wrzzr: Continue down, walk on to the illusory floor on the left, follow the apparition and use the elevator to open a shortcut back to @royal-woods
steps.7o9k73dc: Go back down, hit the illusory wall, save @great-grey-wolf-sif[Puppy Sif] from the Humanity Spirits and pick up the @cleansing-greatshield
steps.i64htvty: Go back out and down to the left, kill all the Humanity Spirits and get the @black-flame pyromancy
steps.ix1ujflh: Head back up, kill the Bloathead Mage and get the @twin-humanities
steps.6r006g2g: Kill the big group of Humanity Spirits and drop down to get the @carvings[Help Me! carving]
steps.h4wwt3cw: Drop down again, walk back up, go down the stone pillar, get the @white-titanite-slab and put on the @silver-pendant

steps.8hz5418w: You can summon @great-grey-wolf-sif[Sif], if you saved him, using the summon sign inside the boss area

steps.c2oqdmfb: Rest at the bonfire, warp to @oolacile-sanctuary and talk to @elizabeth to get three @elizabeths-mushroom[Elizabeth's Mushrooms]

steps.uewcqqme: Farm some @humanity if needed and kindle all the @bonfire[Bonfires]
steps.te8128ib: If you missed any @ore[Titanites] or @crystal-lizard[Crystal Lizards] go and get them
steps.w5u0pwtv: Visit the vendors and buy any items, miracles, sorceries and pyromancies that you will need
steps.99j2tflw: Get any items you need from @snuggly
steps.qk79oojf: Buy any consumables you need from the various vendors, like arrows
steps.p8cdmo97: Buy any armor sets you need from @domhnall-of-zena
steps.vaa2zfmj: Kill @the-ancient-spider-queen and @darkmoon-knightess to get their @fire-keeper-soul[Firekeeper Soul] and talk to @anastacia-of-astora[Anastacia] to reinforce your @estus-flask
steps.qc13zqsq: Kill all the @merchants[Blacksmiths] to get their items
steps.t7kfzuhx: Kill all the other @merchants to get their drops

steps.9lgsft6k: Drop down the hole and if you haven't already then offer the Lord Souls
steps.2modnsb6: Optionally do some @guide-to-co-operative-play[jolly co-op] to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 65-80+ to get summoned

steps.tg4nj9la: After killing him you can use the bonfire to get the good ending and the To Link The Fire achievement
steps.a9hbb6a8: Or you can leave the area to get the evil ending and the Dark Lord achievement

steps.df03f27p: Congratz on completing one of the best RPGs ever made. Now go #undead-asylum[do it again]!
